headline: Session 43 made the Draft War Room feel more like a real scouting room: top targets now carry deterministic proving-ground and pressure-trait backstory, with the primary and innovation queues exhausted honestly.

items.title: Prospect backstory pressure read
items.evidence: public/lib/prospectNarratives.js adds deterministic backstory fields; public/lib/tabDraft.js renders them in Draft War Room target cards; focused tests pass 4/4.

items.title: Audit and innovation exhaustion
items.evidence: docs/AUDIT_2026-07-06_SESSION43.* and .cache/genius-list.json show one shipped item and 0 open work.

followUps.title: Launch evidence
followUps.evidence: Obtain real football@playfranchisearchitect.com delivery proof and verify current live origin/routing before any SPARKED flip.

blockers.title: SPARKED flip
blockers.evidence: Still blocked on real email-forwarding receipt plus current live-origin/routing evidence.

honestyLedger.title: Aggregate npm test timeout
honestyLedger.evidence: npm test timed out twice under the harness and is not counted as green; direct shards passed 288/288 with real exit codes.

honestyLedger.title: Latest-audit follow-through rejected
honestyLedger.evidence: Session 42 cache was already exhausted with 0 open items, so stale rework was rejected and a compound refinement shipped instead.

honestyLedger.title: Missing local optional helpers
honestyLedger.evidence: render-state-vector.mjs, compute-entropy.mjs, and append-genome-snapshot.mjs are not present in this public repo.

diffStat.suite: Direct shards 288/288; Playwright UI 17/17; Pages build/smoke; gates green.
